queries.question: Provide a list of all media franchises and also provide a list of cross-platform expansions with liberals as the target audience.
queries.sql:
SELECT MediaFranchises.name 
FROM MediaFranchises
WHERE MediaFranchises.Business_Strategy = "Media Franchise" OR MediaFranchises.Business_Strategy = "Cross-Platform Expansion" AND MediaFranchises.Audience = "Liberals"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?mediafranchises a :MediaFranchises .
  ?mediafranchises p:name ?name .
  ?mediafranchises p:Business_Strategy ?business_strategy_w .
  ?mediafranchises p:Business_Strategy ?business_strategy_w2 .
  ?mediafranchises p:Audience ?audience_w .
  FILTER((STR(?business_strategy_w) = "Media Franchise" || (STR(?business_strategy_w2) = "Cross-Platform Expansion" && STR(?audience_w) = "Liberals")))
}

queries.question: Display media franchises and cross-platform expansions with liberals as the target audience.
queries.sql:
SELECT MediaFranchises.name 
FROM MediaFranchises
WHERE (MediaFranchises.Business_Strategy = "Media Franchise" OR MediaFranchises.Business_Strategy = "Cross-Platform Expansion") AND MediaFranchises.Audience = "Liberals"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?mediafranchises a :MediaFranchises .
  ?mediafranchises p:name ?name .
  ?mediafranchises p:Business_Strategy ?business_strategy_w .
  ?mediafranchises p:Business_Strategy ?business_strategy_w2 .
  ?mediafranchises p:Audience ?audience_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?business_strategy_w) = "Media Franchise" || STR(?business_strategy_w2) = "Cross-Platform Expansion")) && STR(?audience_w) = "Liberals"))
}
